app.subtitle: A cozy shared chat for your local network

login.incognitoHint: Use a mysterious animal name for this browser session without saving a long-term device identity.

empty.message: No messages yet. Leave the first paw print.

composer.placeholder: Type a message or drop a file here…

upload.networkError: The connection was interrupted; the file was not sent
upload.tooLarge: The file exceeds the server limit
upload.singleFile: One file can be attached to each message for now

errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.sendFailed: Message failed to send. Please try again.
errors.invalidResponse: The server returned an invalid response. Please try again.
